name: dismiss-resolves-without-recording-triage-example
description: handleDismiss must resolve the row as manual:button but MUST NOT record any triage_examples row. Archive-from-attention records a negative example (scenario 02) because it implies classifier overreach; dismiss is weaker — the user is saying 'I'm done with this' not 'you were wrong'. Regression guard: if dismiss starts silently training the model, the learning loop gets a bad signal.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'resolved' AND resolution_method = 'manual:button'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM triage_examples WHERE tracked_item_id = $fixture:0
